description_long: This is a classic freestanding bathtub with a high-backed, slipper-style design, featuring a smooth, glossy white interior and exterior. The tub is supported by four ornate, clawfoot legs in a dark metallic finish, giving it a vintage and elegant appearance. The rim of the bathtub is gently curved, with one end higher than the other for ergonomic reclining. A visible drainage hole is present at the lower end of the tub, but there are no visible plumbing fixtures such as faucets or handles. The exterior is unadorned except for the decorative feet, which add a touch of sophistication. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, cast-iron or enameled steel build, typical of traditional bathtubs found in upscale urban homes or historic neighborhoods.
description: A vintage-style, freestanding white bathtub with ornate clawfoot legs and a high-backed, curved rim. The tub has a glossy finish and a visible drainage hole, but no plumbing fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-backed, curved rim and two clawfoot legs prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, slipper shape and all four clawfoot legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lower end of the tub with the drainage hole and two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tub's length, curved rim, and all four clawfoot legs.
